title: Fixture: Bronze-tier low-criticality UC for tests
description: Finds hosts missing heartbeat events using search after stats — a deliberate SPL smell for grammar audits.
value: Low-criticality bronze baseline ensures prerequisite graphs and schema validators accept minimal sidecars without mistaking them for production gold content.
spl: index=fixture_internal sourcetype=fixture:heartbeat earliest=-2h | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen BY host | eval silent=if(now()-last_seen>3600,1,0) | search silent=1
implementation: Run daily; review silent hosts manually. Referenced as prerequisite seed UC-99.99.9 in gold/silver walk-tier fixtures.
grandmaExplanation: This test-only example checks whether a data collector stopped checking in, using the smallest amount of detail we allow in the catalog.
